prose:
**Fukui reactivity results for furan** were computed using DFT, tier 'standard' **(B3LYP/def2-TZVP)** in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. The geometry was sourced from an external `.xyz` file. The Mulliken-derived Fukui indices were computed for the neutral state and shifted charge states (N±1). Convergence verified; SCF cycles completed successfully. 

Most electrophilic atom: Carbon at position 5 (F+ = 1.9242931). Most nucleophilic atom: Carbon at position 5 (F- = 0.1616371). Warnings: sum(F+)=1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge). sum(F-)=1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge). Common header present. Files: plots available at `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/furan/argo_gpt-4o/20260704-052642_furan_fukui_reactivity/agent_call_01_plot.png`. Command: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 --solvent none /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/furan/furan.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpkl_t9o7k/live.json`.
